title: Bitcoin Breaks $80K but Ripple (XRP) Is Lagging Again: Why Isn’t Capital Rotation Happening?
description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is trading at $1.41, up 1.2% on the day, while Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is up 2.4% above $81,600. BTC just cleared $80K for the first time since January 31, but XRP—which should be among the biggest beneficiaries of capital rotation—only captured about half of Bitcoin’s daily gain. This isn’t just about today. ... Bitcoin Breaks $80K but Ripple (XRP) Is Lagging Again: Why Isn’t Capital Rotation Happening?

title: Breakout time for Cryptos? Bitcoin at $80K; BTC and Ethereum (ETH) Technical Outlook
description: Crypto update: Bitcoin surges past the $80,000 mark as tech-driven capital flows and institutional accumulation propel the digital asset space higher. With crypto increasingly acting as a high-beta haven amid energy shocks, explore an in-depth technical analysis of BTC and ETH.
